abilities.description: When you absorb the latent energies of your environment, roll +wits. On a strong hit, take the value of your action die as +charge. Then, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} +charge to create a minor effect. If you do, suffer -1 charge and take +1 momentum on a hit. On a weak hit, as above, but capturing these energies is taxing; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-2].
As above, and you may also @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} +charge by weaving these energies in your interaction.

When you have at least 4 charge, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} by unleashing them all in a dramatic display. On hit, you achieve a major mystical feat and take half the spent charge as +momentum [rounded up].
